name: Vinh Trinh
program: MS HCDE · University of Washington · Class of 2026
bio_formal: I'm a graduate student in Human Centered Design & Engineering at UW, focused on understanding how people interact with technology — and making those interactions better. I care about research that leads to real outcomes, and design that actually works for the people using it.
bio_casual: Hey — I'm Vinh, a grad student studying Human Centered Design & Engineering at the University of Washington. I'm interested in the messy, human side of technology: why people use things the way they do, what gets in the way, and how to fix it. I like research that actually goes somewhere, and design that respects the people it's for.
currently: Finishing my capstone project (see the countdown timer for my mental state)
Figuring out what comes next after graduation
Probably spending too much time on this website
misc: Has strong opinions about font choices
Believes the best UX is the one nobody notices
